User Story
As an exporter

I need my container identification number to be validated

So that I ensure the number I provide is compliant with EU CATCH system

Acceptance Criteria
Scenario 1 - Container identification number validation applied to Cotainer vessel arrival details

Given I have navigated to /add-arrival-transportation-details-container-vessel in my NMD user journey

When I enter a container identification number that does not conform to this regex pattern: ^[A-Z]{3}[UJZR]d{6}d$

And I press Save and continue

Then I see a field-level error of “Enter a shipping container number in the correct format. This must be 11 characters: 3 letters, then U, J, Z or R, then 7 numbers.”

And the error is displayed in the error summary box at the top of the page

Example valid values: ABCJ01234567 or XYZU98765432 

 

Scenario 2 - Container identification number validation applied to Truck departure details

Given I have navigated to /add-transportation-details-truck in my NMD user journey

When I enter a container identification number that does not conform to this regex pattern: ^[A-Z]{3}[UJZR]d{6}d$

And I press Save and continue

Then I see a field-level error of “Enter a shipping container number in the correct format. This must be 11 characters: 3 letters, then U, J, Z or R, then 7 numbers.”

And the error is displayed in the error summary box at the top of the page

Example valid values: ABCJ01234567 or XYZU98765432 

 

Scenario 3 - Container identification number validation applied to Train departure details

Given I have navigated to /add-transportation-details-train in my NMD user journey

When I enter a container identification number that does not conform to this regex pattern: ^[A-Z]{3}[UJZR]d{6}d$

And I press Save and continue

Then I see a field-level error of “Enter a shipping container number in the correct format. This must be 11 characters: 3 letters, then U, J, Z or R, then 7 numbers.”

And the error is displayed in the error summary box at the top of the page

Example valid values: ABCJ01234567 or XYZU98765432 

 

Scenario 4 - Container identification number validation applied to Container vessel departure details

Given I have navigated to /add-transportation-details-container-vessel in my NMD user journey

When I enter a container identification number that does not conform to this regex pattern: ^[A-Z]{3}[UJZR]d{6}d$

And I press Save and continue

Then I see a field-level error of “Enter a shipping container number in the correct format. This must be 11 characters: 3 letters, then U, J, Z or R, then 7 numbers.”

And the error is displayed in the error summary box at the top of the page

Example valid values: ABCJ01234567 or XYZU98765432 

 

Scenario 5 - Welsh translation

Given  I have selected Welsh language

When I have triggered the error in scenario 1,2,3,4,5 or 6

Then the error is translated to Welsh

English text

Welsh translation

Enter a shipping container number in the correct format. This must be 11 characters: 3 letters, then U, J, Z or R, then 7 numbers.

Rhowch rif cynhwysydd llong yn y fformat cywir. Rhaid iddo fod yn 11 o gymeriadau: 3 llythyren, yna U, J, Z neu R, yna 7 rhif.

Additional Notes
Please note that the mandatory/optional nature of the field remains as is (i.e. mandatory for container vessel, but optional for Truck and Train)
